title: NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Support leftprotoport and rightprotoport options. (RHEL-130909)
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131235)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127867)
full_text:
[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Support leftprotoport and rightprotoport options. (RHEL-130909)
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131235)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127867)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0132.html
